text_block_list.name: Shakur (LANE)
text_block_list.text:
Meet me in the stands on campus in thirty
minutes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur's summons is abrupt and nondescript,
but I figure I'll see what she needs me for once I
get there.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Look.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Those two are about to have a scrimmage.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, Doto. How's your throat? I assume
your vocal cords are nice and warmed up for
today?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out on the tracks stands T.M. Opera O, a racer
who's been crushing her senior year with win after
win.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, ma'am! Wait, my throat?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And with her is Meisho Doto, a runner of equal
ability who's allegedly (?) biding her time to
triumph over her rival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Currently, they stand at the top as leaders of the
Umamusume world.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
O-oh no, I'm so sorry! I didn't prepare my vocal
cords at all!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Now that's a shame. We have such an
audience today, I thought we could send
everyone off with a song at the end.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: I-I'll go get some honey right awa—

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, look at you! You're in tip-top shape! Come
on back here! We have a race to run!

text_block_list.name: Opera O & Doto
text_block_list.text:
Haaaaah!
Yaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Spectating Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
W-wow... They're running like it's a bona fide
race, not just a little scrimmage...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The air almost seems to shimmer from the sheer
force emanating from them. Their unparalleled
strength is the result of diligent daily work.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Parcae predicts that I'll lose spectacularly at the
Japan Cup.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's multiple facets to it... but those two are a
major factor. The wall formed by the people in
the years above isn't an easy one to overcome.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Everyone in my year followin' this path—including
me—is doomed to fail before even stepping foot
on their shadows.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And when the next generation eventually shows
up on the turf, even they'll surpass us in the blink
of an eye...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: We're the weakest generation.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All right, you want my optimal route for senior
year? There isn't one.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
According to Parcae's predictions, I'm not gonna
win a single race after the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So this whole thing went beyond whether Shakur
was capable of winning... The public's poor
predictions were weighing on her too...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Just 'cause my fate's changed doesn't mean the
competition's gotten any weaker.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Their stats are literally off the charts. Those two
are always practically hand-in-hand, taking first
and second... Anyone can see that.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If this were a game, I could just put off the battle,
grind out a few levels, then come back to
challenge 'em again.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But there's no time to waste in the world of
racing. It's not like we stay at our physical peak
forever.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Instead of a seven-centimeter gap, now I've got
boss monsters to deal with.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Talk about the worst game ever.
choice_data_list: You seem to be enjoying it, though.
You seem to be enjoying it, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like my hunch was right. Could it be I'm
starting to understand her a little better?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Listen up. From this point onwards, the conditions
for winnin' are simple.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All I gotta do is crush everyone. If I can pull that
off, that'll automatically default me to bein' the
top runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her senior year starts almost immediately after
the Japan Cup. It seems she's willing to share an
outline of her future strategy and how she plans
to run.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Once I'm standin' at the top, it won't matter what
people think. There'll be no question who's the
real deal.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her declaration makes her current grasp of her
situation clear as day. Air Shakur performed
spectacularly during the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, public opinion on her remains largely
ambivalent, and she's likely trying to figure out
why. But if her response is to defeat everyone at
the top...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Then she probably doesn't believe she's had
enough overwhelmingly decisive victories. In that
case...
choice_data_list: I wish the wall was even higher.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list:
That way, the impact would be even bigger
when you tear it down.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And perhaps she could earn a title that exceeds
the accolade of the Classic Triple Crown.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
They're bad enough as it is. I don't need 'em to be
any stronger.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're aware of how strong they are, right? I've
already analyzed their stats. Now all that's left is
to train—

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hm...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: It's not enough. Something's missing...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Um... What do you mean, Opera O?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Doto, you must undergo a
metamorphosis!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh? A meta... Meta-what-now?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I wish to make the upcoming Japan Cup a race to
remember! I want to fill it with excitement like no
one has felt before.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If you, my rival, were to evolve and chase after
me with the grace of a butterfly, the crowd is sure
to be pleased!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And what greater show can we give than if I were
to become a bee and deliver the final stinging
blow! But only you hold the key to this possibility!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: But I...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Will you come at me, Doto? Will you charge at
me with such ferocity as though to tear out my
throat?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Y-yes!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm? The air... It's shifted.

text_block_list.name: Opera O & Doto
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaaah!
Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This can't be. They're... they're getting even
better.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Those two may be monsters, but even monsters
have limits.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The rest is puzzle-solving. I could polish my skills.
I could work on controlling the pace of the race
to my advantage... The path to victory is varied.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
But... It almost looks like Opera and Doto just
broke their limits...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: And so easily too...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even after the race is over, Air Shakur continues
to stare at them in silent astonishment for some
time.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...I need to go. I have to add this to my
calculations.
choice_data_list: Are you going to be all right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Save your worries for someone who needs it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's no question of what I need to do. I hold
myself to the threshold values I've crunched out
and win, just like I planned—just like I always
have.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What?
choice_data_list:
What do you want from running? Why do you
do it?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The seven-centimeter gap is a thing of the past,
and her senior year is a clean slate to work with.
But what does Air Shakur want from her future?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Isn't that obvious? I want to win.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Victory serves as absolute and irrefutable proof.
Who can argue I'm wrong if I win?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
If I keep provin' I'm right, then all the annoying
background noise should stop.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
And to do that, I'm not gonna wait for anyone to
give me props. I'll seize them myself. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Doesn't matter. Anyway...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford to fail at the Japan Cup. This crappy
fate of mine has changed for the better.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: There's no way I'm gonna lose here.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"There's Air Shakur, the best of the weakest
generation. She really doesn't stand a chance
against anyone who came before or after her,
does she?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"I guess the writing was on the wall. It's not like
she was ever strong. She just got lucky, that's
all..."

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Dammit, I fell asleep. I've gotta hurry up and
compile this—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzt! Bzzt!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
"Would you like to have some salt ramen? It's my
treat if you come now! ♪"
Huh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzt! Bzzt, bzzt, bzzt...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Man, enough already!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzt...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Now's not the time for a leisurely bowl of ramen.
Even if I can't win, there's no way I'm letting
myself get steamrolled.)
